code-runner.executorMap.cpp: cmd /c "set VSCMD=%ProgramFiles%\Microsoft Visual Studio\2026\Community\Common7\Tools\VsDevCmd.bat && if not exist ""%VSCMD%"" set VSCMD=%ProgramFiles%\Microsoft Visual Studio\2026\BuildTools\Common7\Tools\VsDevCmd.bat && if not exist ""%VSCMD%"" set VSCMD=%ProgramFiles%\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\Community\Common7\Tools\VsDevCmd.bat && if not exist ""%VSCMD%"" set VSCMD=%ProgramFiles%\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\BuildTools\Common7\Tools\VsDevCmd.bat && if not exist ""%VSCMD%"" (echo Visual Studio Build Tools not found. Install MSVC C++ toolset. & exit /b 1) && call ""%VSCMD%"" -arch=x64 && cl /std:c++20 /EHsc /nologo ""$fileName"" /Fe:""$fileNameWithoutExt.exe"" && ""$fileNameWithoutExt.exe"""
